title: Filter rows with WHERE
instruction:
The `WHERE` clause filters rows. Only rows matching the condition are returned.

Run this.
successMessage: Only rows where `dept = 'Engineering'` are returned. String comparisons in SQL use single quotes.

title: AND and OR conditions
instruction:
Combine conditions with `AND` (both must be true) and `OR` (either must be true).

Run this.
successMessage: Both conditions must be true. Only in-stock products under $100 are returned.

title: LIKE for pattern matching
instruction:
`LIKE` matches string patterns. `%` is a wildcard for any sequence, `_` for a single character.

Run this.
successMessage: `%@gmail.com` matches any email ending in `@gmail.com`. The `%` wildcard matches zero or more characters.

title: IN and BETWEEN
instruction:
`IN` matches against a list. `BETWEEN` matches a range (inclusive on both ends).

Run this.
successMessage: `IN` is cleaner than multiple `OR` conditions. `BETWEEN 40 AND 150` is inclusive — it includes both 40 and 150.
